mapper.update: SELECT setval( pg_get_serial_sequence('schedule_task', 'task_id'), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(task_id) FROM schedule_task), 0) + 1, false )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_task ( project_id, task_title, task_status, priority, assignee_user_id, start_date, due_date, progress_rate, description ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{task_title}, #{task_status}, #{priority}, #{assignee_user_id}, CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{due_date} AS DATE), #{progress_rate}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_task SET project_id = #{project_id}, task_title = #{task_title}, task_status = #{task_status}, priority = #{priority}, assignee_user_id = #{assignee_user_id}, start_date = CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), due_date = CAST(#{due_date} AS DATE), progress_rate = #{progress_rate}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{task_id}
